title: Iran War Live Updates: 2 Ships Are Attacked as Future of Talks Is Uncertain
summary_full: Iran’s state media said the military had carried out “enforcement actions” near the contested Strait of Hormuz. The United States and Iran were locked in a stalemate after President Trump extended a cease-fire but Tehran declined to join peace talks.
